softwareOnly.description: All ideas must be implementable entirely in software. No hardware, manufacturing, physical products, or lab work.
rejectionCriteria: Requires custom hardware or physical device
Requires laboratory experiments or wet lab work
Depends on sensors, robots, or IoT hardware not already commodity
Requires custom electronics, PCBs, or embedded firmware
Requires physical material handling, logistics, or warehousing operations

rejected: Smart home hardware requiring custom circuit boards
Custom PCB design tool output that requires manufacturing
Lab equipment automation requiring non-commodity sensors
Physical product personalization requiring manufacturing line
